testcase.name: test_translate_blocks_batch_respects_stop_flag

failure.message: AttributeError: Mock object has no attribute 'translate_once'

testcase.failure: tests/test_sentence_mode_consistency.py:162: in test_translate_blocks_batch_respects_stop_flag client.translate_once.side_effect = translate_once_side_effect ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ ../../miniforge3/envs/translate-tool/lib/python3.11/unittest/mock.py:653: in __getattr__ raise AttributeError("Mock object has no attribute %r" % name) E AttributeError: Mock object has no attribute 'translate_once'
